title: FEILANDUO Seagrass Belly Basket Woven Plant Pot with Handle, Natural Foldable Laundry Toy Storage Baskets for Shelves (Natural, Widest Part 22 x 20cm)
features: Material: Seagrass.Plant Basket Size: top opening diameter: 7.1inch/18cm; widest part diameter: 8.7inch/22cm, Height: 7.9inch/20cm(handle not included)

Multiuse for Different Scenes: Not only use it for a storage basket,but also use as a plant pot cover to decorate potted house planter, beautify your favourite plants, adds boho flair to home, offices, hotels

Unique Appearance: As a Foldable Storage Basket, fold in the middle to create a bowl shape, can be used for home storage. Durable handles design, easy to move and take away, practical adorable wicker storage bins for daily use. Minimalistic combined with rustic style, makes the whole flower basket in simple and elegant

Multi-use: Hamper baskets for gifts empty great for by the front door to put dog toys,blankets,books, magazines,cosmetics, headset wire, remote control, magnetic card, CD, keys, note storage, vegetables, fruits, flowers and more home supplies. fits on a bedside table, closet shelf, bookshelf, desk,floor etc.

FEILANDUO wicker decorative basket would be a great addition to anyone's home decor. Widely used it in bedroom, living room, bathroom, restroom,dinning room,or laundry room. Great gift ideas for housewarming,Valentine's Day,also suitable for welcome gifts at job and any other occasion.
description: Product Description Usually used be a plant pot to plant the flower to make your home more chic How to choose basket size accurately: The diameter marked is the widest part in the middle of the basket, and the diameter of the flowerpot is less than and close to the diameter of the basket, which is the most suitable. As an Elegant Plant Basket Different sizes for different usage, choose the size according to your needs Small sizes belly basket could be used as a storage basket for toys, dolls or other small stuff or used as kids tote basket Medium size basket suitable to hold medium size indoor plants Large size basket suitable to hold large size indoor plants or trees Use it as a plant basket for your fiddle leaf fig tree, snake plant and so on, Brings a while new different look for your plant. This handmade seagrass basket is great for a corridor, living room, kid's room, bathroom, balcony space or outdoor. 100% Natural Seagrass Material The basket is made of natural seagrass and designed with sturdy handles, handmade product,every basket will be a little different not as machine made. Please kindly allowed for the existence of some flaws. Foldable Design Folding the middle and create a lovely bowl shape,can used as a home decor to adapts to your different needs. Due to seasonal factors, if you receive a greenish basket, don't worry, as the seagrass continues to age and dry, it will turn the color of the advertised picture FEILANDUO Creative Home Storage Decorative Boho Baskets Not only use as a basic planter cover, but also use it for various purposes; Great for storage bins for clothes, blanket, baby toys, home supplies, picnic,grocery baskets, beach bag. Widely used it in livingroom, bedroom, restroom, nursery or laundry room.
